creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
Sorry for not getting to this earlier.
I'm very hesitant to add the analogue clock as part of xscreensaver, since it is not part of the original package.  Currently, it also looks like the source link is dead.
If possible, add that hack as a separate port.
The NLS changes have been incorporated into the patches in bug 201254.
